parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Locale code used to localize the response, for example `pl` or `en`.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Optional list of article identifiers to include.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Filter articles created/updated from this date (ISO string).

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Filter articles created/updated up to this date (ISO string).
